terminal_objectives.statement: Apply the WCAG 2.2 POUR principles to evaluate and improve the accessibility of web content
Create accessible text alternatives and media content that comply with WCAG Perceivable requirements

chapter_objectives.statement: Explain the four POUR principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust) and how each addresses different categories of access barriers
Describe the structure of WCAG 2.2 including its principles, guidelines, success criteria, and conformance levels (A, AA, AAA)
Apply best practices for writing effective alt text that distinguishes between decorative, informative, functional, and complex images
Evaluate video content for compliance with WCAG Success Criteria 1.2.1 through 1.2.5 covering captions, audio descriptions, and media alternatives
